---
title: "Trees"
author: "Casey Martin"
date: "2024-11-18"
output: pdf_document
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(tidymodels)
library(knitr)
library(rpart.plot)
library(vip)
library(doParallel)
```

# Decision Tree

```{r, cache=TRUE}
set.seed(445)
train_cv_5fold <- vfold_cv(dataset_train, v = 5)

tree_spec <- decision_tree(tree_depth = tune("depth"), cost_complexity = tune("alpha")) |>
  set_engine("rpart") |>
  set_mode("regression")

tree_rec <- recipe(price ~ ., data = dataset_train)

tree_wf <- workflow() |>
  add_model(tree_spec) |>
  add_recipe(tree_rec)

tune_df <- data.frame(depth = seq(1:10), alpha = 10^seq(-3, -1, length.out = 10))

tree_tune_fit <- tree_wf |>
  tune_grid(resamples = train_cv_5fold, grid = tune_df)

tree_tune_fit |>
  autoplot()

show_best(tree_tune_fit, metric = "rmse", n = 1)

tree_final <- finalize_workflow(tree_wf, select_best(tree_tune_fit, metric = "rmse"))

tree_final_fit <- tree_final |>
  fit(data = dataset_train)

tree_final_fit |>
  extract_fit_engine() |>
  rpart.plot(roundint=FALSE)

vip(tree_final_fit)

dataset_pred_tree <- predict(tree_final_fit, dataset_test)
RMSE <- sqrt((1/nrow(dataset_pred_tree))*(sum(dataset_test$price - dataset_pred_tree$.pred))^2)
RMSE
```

# Random Forest

```{r, cache=TRUE}
set.seed(445)

rf_spec <- rand_forest(mtry = sqrt(.cols()), trees = 150) |>
  set_engine("randomForest", importance = TRUE) |>
  set_mode("regression")

rf_rec <- recipe(price ~ ., data = dataset_train)

rf_wf <- workflow() |>
  add_model(rf_spec) |>
  add_recipe(rf_rec)

rf_fit <- rf_wf |>
  fit(dataset_train)

vip(rf_fit)

dataset_pred_rf <- predict(rf_fit, dataset_test)
RMSE <- sqrt((1/nrow(dataset_pred_rf))*(sum(dataset_test$price - dataset_pred_rf$.pred))^2)
RMSE
```


# Boosting

### Tune depth

```{r, cache=TRUE}
set.seed(445)

train_cv_5fold <- vfold_cv(dataset_train, v = 5)

# Setup parallel processing
all_cores <- parallel::detectCores(logical = FALSE)
cl <- makePSOCKcluster(all_cores)
registerDoParallel(cl)

# Model setup
boost_spec <- boost_tree(trees = 756, tree_depth = tune('depth'), learn_rate = 0.00774) |>
  set_engine("xgboost") |>
  set_mode("regression")

boost_rec <- recipe(price ~ ., data = dataset_train) |>
  step_dummy(all_nominal_predictors())

boost_wf <- workflow() |>
  add_model(boost_spec) |>
  add_recipe(boost_rec)

# Tuning
tune_df <- data.frame(depth = seq(1, 5))

start.time <- Sys.time()

boost_tune_fit <- boost_wf |>
  tune_grid(resamples = train_cv_5fold, grid = tune_df)

end.time <- Sys.time()
time.taken <- end.time - start.time
print(paste("Time elapsed tuning:", time.taken))

# Metrics
boost_tune_fit |>
  autoplot()

show_best(boost_tune_fit, metric = "rmse", n = 1)

# Final fitting and testing
boost_final <- finalize_workflow(boost_wf, select_best(boost_tune_fit, metric = "rmse"))

boost_final_fit <- boost_final |>
  fit(data = dataset_train)

vip(boost_final_fit)

dataset_pred_boost <- predict(boost_final_fit, dataset_test)
RMSE <- sqrt((1/nrow(dataset_pred_boost))*(sum(dataset_test$price - dataset_pred_boost$.pred))^2)
RMSE

```

### Tune lambda

```{r, cache=TRUE}
set.seed(445)

all_cores <- parallel::detectCores(logical = FALSE)

cl <- makePSOCKcluster(all_cores)
registerDoParallel(cl)

boost_spec <- boost_tree(trees = 756, tree_depth = 1, learn_rate = tune("lambda")) |>
  set_engine("xgboost") |>
  set_mode("regression")

boost_rec <- recipe(price ~ ., data = dataset_train) |>
  step_dummy(all_nominal_predictors())

boost_wf <- workflow() |>
  add_model(boost_spec) |>
  add_recipe(boost_rec)

tune_df <- data.frame(lambda = 10^seq(-3, 1, length.out = 10))

start.time <- Sys.time()

boost_tune_fit <- boost_wf |>
  tune_grid(resamples = train_cv_5fold, grid = tune_df)

end.time <- Sys.time()
time.taken <- end.time - start.time
print(paste("Time elapsed tuning:", time.taken))

boost_tune_fit |>
  autoplot()

show_best(boost_tune_fit, metric = "rmse", n = 1)

boost_final <- finalize_workflow(boost_wf, select_best(boost_tune_fit, metric = "rmse"))

boost_final_fit <- boost_final |>
  fit(data = dataset_train)

vip(boost_final_fit)

dataset_pred_boost <- predict(boost_final_fit, dataset_test)
RMSE <- sqrt((1/nrow(dataset_pred_boost))*(sum(dataset_test$price - dataset_pred_boost$.pred))^2)
RMSE

```

### Tune trees

```{r, cache=TRUE}
set.seed(445)

all_cores <- parallel::detectCores(logical = FALSE)

cl <- makePSOCKcluster(all_cores)
registerDoParallel(cl)

boost_spec <- boost_tree(trees = tune("trees"), tree_depth = 2, learn_rate = 0.00774) |>
  set_engine("xgboost") |>
  set_mode("regression")

boost_rec <- recipe(price ~ ., data = dataset_train) |>
  step_dummy(all_nominal_predictors())

boost_wf <- workflow() |>
  add_model(boost_spec) |>
  add_recipe(boost_rec)

tune_df <- data.frame(trees = seq(100, 6000, length.out = 10))

start.time <- Sys.time()

boost_tune_fit <- boost_wf |>
  tune_grid(resamples = train_cv_5fold, grid = tune_df)

end.time <- Sys.time()
time.taken <- end.time - start.time
print(paste("Time elapsed tuning:", time.taken))

boost_tune_fit |>
  autoplot()

show_best(boost_tune_fit, metric = "rmse", n = 1)

boost_final <- finalize_workflow(boost_wf, select_best(boost_tune_fit, metric = "rmse"))

boost_final_fit <- boost_final |>
  fit(data = dataset_train)

vip(boost_final_fit)

dataset_pred_boost <- predict(boost_final_fit, dataset_test)
RMSE <- sqrt((1/nrow(dataset_pred_boost))*(sum(dataset_test$price - dataset_pred_boost$.pred))^2)
RMSE

```

### Tune lambda and depth

```{r, cache=TRUE}
set.seed(445)

all_cores <- parallel::detectCores(logical = FALSE)

cl <- makePSOCKcluster(all_cores)
registerDoParallel(cl)

boost_spec <- boost_tree(trees = 5000, tree_depth = tune('depth'), learn_rate = tune("lambda")) |>
  set_engine("xgboost") |>
  set_mode("regression")

boost_rec <- recipe(price ~ ., data = dataset_train) |>
  step_dummy(all_nominal_predictors())

boost_wf <- workflow() |>
  add_model(boost_spec) |>
  add_recipe(boost_rec)

tune_df <- data.frame(depth = seq(1, 5, length.out = 5), lambda = 10^seq(-3, 1, length.out = 5))

start.time <- Sys.time()

boost_tune_fit <- boost_wf |>
  tune_grid(resamples = train_cv_5fold, grid = tune_df)

end.time <- Sys.time()
time.taken <- end.time - start.time
print(paste("Time elapsed tuning:", time.taken))

boost_tune_fit |>
  autoplot()

show_best(boost_tune_fit, metric = "rmse", n = 1)

boost_final <- finalize_workflow(boost_wf, select_best(boost_tune_fit, metric = "rmse"))

boost_final_fit <- boost_final |>
  fit(data = dataset_train)

vip(boost_fit)

dataset_pred_boost <- predict(boost_final_fit, dataset_test)
RMSE <- sqrt((1/nrow(dataset_pred_boost))*(sum(dataset_test$price - dataset_pred_boost$.pred))^2)
RMSE

```

### Tune lambda trees and depth

```{r, cache=TRUE}
set.seed(445)

all_cores <- parallel::detectCores(logical = FALSE)

cl <- makePSOCKcluster(all_cores)
registerDoParallel(cl)

boost_spec <- boost_tree(trees = tune("trees"), tree_depth = tune('depth'), learn_rate = tune("lambda")) |>
  set_engine("xgboost") |>
  set_mode("regression")

boost_rec <- recipe(price ~ ., data = dataset_train) |>
  step_dummy(all_nominal_predictors())

boost_wf <- workflow() |>
  add_model(boost_spec) |>
  add_recipe(boost_rec)

tune_df <- data.frame(depth = seq(1, 5, length.out = 5), lambda = 10^seq(-3, 1, length.out = 5), trees = seq(100, 1000, length.out = 5))

start.time <- Sys.time()

boost_tune_fit <- boost_wf |>
  tune_grid(resamples = train_cv_5fold, grid = tune_df)

end.time <- Sys.time()
time.taken <- end.time - start.time
print(paste("Time elapsed tuning:", time.taken))

boost_tune_fit |>
  autoplot()

show_best(boost_tune_fit, metric = "rmse", n = 1)

boost_final <- finalize_workflow(boost_wf, select_best(boost_tune_fit, metric = "rmse"))

boost_final_fit <- boost_final |>
  fit(data = dataset_train)

vip(boost_fit)

dataset_pred_boost <- predict(boost_final_fit, dataset_test)
RMSE <- sqrt((1/nrow(dataset_pred_boost))*(sum(dataset_test$price - dataset_pred_boost$.pred))^2)
RMSE

```

### Manual

```{r}
set.seed(445)

boost_spec <- boost_tree(trees = 5000, tree_depth = 5, learn_rate = 0.01) |>
  set_engine("xgboost") |>
  set_mode("regression")

boost_rec <- recipe(price ~ ., data = dataset_train) |>
  step_dummy(all_nominal_predictors())

boost_wf <- workflow() |>
  add_model(boost_spec) |>
  add_recipe(boost_rec)

start.time <- Sys.time()

boost_fit <- boost_wf |>
  fit(dataset_train)

end.time <- Sys.time()
time.taken <- end.time - start.time
print(paste("Time elapsed fitting:", time.taken))

vip(boost_fit)

dataset_pred_boost <- predict(boost_fit, dataset_test)
RMSE <- sqrt((1/nrow(dataset_pred_boost))*(sum(dataset_test$price - dataset_pred_boost$.pred))^2)
RMSE
```
